$comment: HARDENED capability profile for a DEDICATED mesh-reachable PM session (f2-13). NOT the user-global ~/.claude/settings.json — apply this only to a session that receives mesh messages, e.g. as a project-level .claude/settings.json for the mesh-coordinator project. Deny-by-default posture: defaultMode is 'default' (never bypassPermissions), the deny list makes irreversible/external actions non-executable, and the allow list is curated to the minimum a coordinator needs (receive/reply over the mesh + read-only git + Read). It contains NO interpreter wildcard (python/node/bash -c) so a prefix-deny cannot be bypassed via an interpreter. Verified clean by: python3 -m pm_mesh.capability_lint <this-file> mesh-reachable-pm (exit 0).
